description: Target-neutral test manifest for legacy OpenEMR now and modernized OpenEMR later.

plans.name: Slice 1 Readiness
plans.description: Read-only patient-search/chart-summary confidence plan for both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.name: Slice 2 Scheduling Readiness

plans.description: Mutation-capable lab procedure confidence plan that creates a temporary procedure report with collected date and specimen number, verifies report metadata through database and UI surfaces, and cleans it up on both legacy and modernized targets.

plans.description: Read-only patient-document confidence plan that verifies current revision timestamp, version label, history count, and modernized revision rendering for the document anchor.

plans.description: Mutation-capable patient-document confidence plan that verifies content replacement updates the current revision timestamp and hash in place.

plans.name: Slice 128 Patient Binary Document Content Replacement Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient-document confidence plan that creates a temporary PDF, replaces its binary payload, verifies preview/revision/download facts, and cleans up.

plans.description: Mutation-capable revenue-cycle confidence plan that creates, renders, voids, and removes a payment posting while verifying account balance and ledger effects.

plans.description: Mutation-capable revenue-cycle confidence plan that creates, renders, closes, archives, and removes a collections follow-up pnotes task from the past-due work queue.

plans.name: Slice 66 Message Content Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable patient-message confidence plan that edits a pnotes/message title and body without changing message counts.

plans.name: Slice 69 Encounter Claims Readiness
plans.description: Read-only encounter claim confidence plan that verifies claim status rows linked to a shared encounter anchor and renders them on the modernized encounter detail surface.

plans.description: Read-only encounter procedure-order confidence plan that verifies lab orders linked to a shared encounter anchor and renders them on the modernized encounter detail surface.

plans.description: Mutation-capable encounter billing linkage plan that creates a temporary CPT fee-sheet line, verifies it through encounter-linked billing and diagnosis surfaces, deactivates it, and deletes it.

plans.description: Mutation-capable encounter diagnosis-coding plan that creates a temporary ICD10 fee-sheet diagnosis row, verifies encounter diagnosis-coding surfaces, deactivates it, and deletes it.

plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, marks pending, renders, and removes a temporary future appointment on both targets.

plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, reassigns provider, renders, and removes a temporary future appointment on both targets.

plans.name: Slice 100 Appointment Facility Reassignment Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, reassigns facility, renders, and removes a temporary future appointment on both targets.

plans.name: Slice 101 Appointment Billing Location Reassignment Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, reassigns billing location separately from service facility, renders, and removes a temporary future appointment on both targets.

plans.name: Slice 102 Appointment Comments Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, updates comments, renders, and removes a temporary future appointment on both targets.

plans.name: Slice 103 Appointment Recurrence Metadata Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, updates recurrence metadata, renders, and removes a temporary future appointment on both targets.

plans.name: Slice 104 Appointment Recurring Series Readiness
plans.description: Read-only scheduling plan that expands seeded recurring appointment anchors into dated occurrences and verifies modernized Calendar rendering.

plans.name: Slice 105 Appointment Recurrence Exceptions Readiness
plans.description: Read-only scheduling plan that verifies seeded recurring appointment exception dates are skipped while occurrence numbering stays aligned.

plans.name: Slice 106 Appointment Occurrence Cancel Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that cancels one generated recurring appointment occurrence by adding an exception date and restores the seeded exception list.

plans.name: Slice 107 Appointment Occurrence Restore Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that restores a skipped generated recurring appointment occurrence by removing its exception date and preserving the seeded exception list.

plans.name: Slice 108 Appointment Occurrence Reschedule Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that reschedules one generated recurring appointment occurrence into a standalone appointment while skipping the original date.

plans.name: Slice 109 Appointment Recurrence Exception Edit Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that edits the skipped-date list on a recurring appointment root and verifies generated occurrence expansion.

plans.name: Slice 110 Appointment Series Root Update Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that edits a recurring appointment root and verifies title and time propagation to generated future occurrences.

plans.name: Slice 111 Appointment Series Root Metadata Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that edits recurring appointment root metadata and verifies provider, facility, category, status, room, and comment propagation to generated future occurrences.

plans.name: Slice 112 Appointment Monthly Recurrence Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, updates, renders, expands, and removes a monthly recurring appointment.

plans.name: Slice 113 Appointment Recurrence Unit Matrix Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, renders, expands, and removes daily, workday, and yearly recurring appointments.

plans.name: Slice 114 Appointment Days-of-Week Recurrence Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, renders, expands, and removes a selected-weekday recurring appointment.

plans.name: Slice 115 Appointment Monthly Repeat-On Recurrence Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates, renders, expands, and removes nth-weekday and last-weekday monthly recurring appointments.

plans.name: Slice 116 Appointment Series Recurrence Update Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that updates a seeded recurring appointment root cadence and end date, verifies generated occurrence propagation, and restores the seed.

plans.name: Slice 117 Appointment Provider Overlap Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates overlapping same-provider appointments, verifies legacy-compatible double-booking tolerance, renders the modernized overlap detail, and removes both appointments.

plans.name: Slice 118 Appointment Patient Overlap Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates overlapping same-patient appointments, verifies legacy-compatible double-booking tolerance, renders the modernized patient overlap detail, and removes both appointments.

plans.name: Slice 119 Appointment Room Overlap Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable scheduling plan that creates overlapping same-room appointments, verifies legacy-compatible double-booking tolerance, renders the modernized room overlap detail, and removes both appointments.

plans.name: Slice 120 Appointment Reminders Readiness
plans.description: Read-only scheduling plan that derives appointment reminder readiness from seeded future appointments and patient contact consent, then renders the modernized reminder detail.

plans.name: Slice 121 Encounter Co-Signature Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable encounter co-signature plan that records two encounter signatures from distinct users, verifies ordering and rendering, deletes both signatures, and cleans up the temporary encounter.

plans.name: Slice 122 Encounter Document Revision Readiness
plans.description: Read-only encounter document plan that verifies current revision timestamp, version label, history count, hash, and modernized attachment-card rendering for seeded encounter documents.

plans.name: Slice 123 Encounter Document Replacement Revision Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable encounter document plan that creates an attachment, replaces its content, verifies current revision hash/timestamp facts, renders the replacement, and cleans up on both targets.

plans.name: Slice 126 Encounter Scanned Attachment Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable encounter document plan that creates a scanned PDF attachment, verifies scan-source and OCR readiness facts, renders the modernized encounter attachment card, and cleans up on both targets.

plans.name: Slice 127 Encounter Binary Document Content Replacement Readiness
plans.description: Mutation-capable encounter document plan that creates a binary PDF attachment, replaces its stored bytes, verifies preview and revision facts, renders the modernized encounter attachment card, downloads the replacement payload, and cleans up on both targets.

plans.name: Legacy Readiness
plans.description: Read-only baseline confidence plan for the currently seeded legacy application.

plans.name: Isolated Workflow Mutations
plans.description: Mutation-heavy workflow plan that reseeds before every test for strongest isolation.

plans.name: Full Parity Contract
plans.description: Complete parity plan for every implemented workflow suite. Modernized target joins this plan after mutation-capable workflow slices exist.

resetModes.description: Do not reset the target database before running tests.
Reset once before the selected test run.
Reset before each individual test. Slowest, but strongest isolation for mutation tests.

suites.name: Patient Search And Chart Summary
suites.description: Compares the first modernized read-only slice against the legacy baseline using the shared anchor patient.

suites.name: Scheduling Appointment Detail
suites.description: Compares the read-only future appointment detail workflow against the legacy scheduler using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Encounter Clinical Detail
suites.description: Compares the read-only encounter SOAP and vitals detail workflow against the legacy encounter UI using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Clinical Lists And Medications
suites.description: Compares read-only problems, allergies, medication list entries, and prescriptions against the legacy chart using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Patient Messages And Portal Flags
suites.description: Compares read-only portal-enabled patient message behavior against the legacy chart using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Procedure Results
suites.description: Compares completed lab procedure order, report, and final result rendering against the legacy procedure results screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Pending Scheduled Procedure Orders
suites.description: Compares future scheduled procedure orders with no report rows against the legacy procedure results screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Fee Sheet Billing
suites.description: Compares read-only encounter fee sheet billing lines against the legacy fee sheet using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Claim Status
suites.description: Compares seeded OpenEMR claim status history and modernized billing claim-status rendering for the shared billing anchor.

suites.name: Payment Posting
suites.description: Compares seeded OpenEMR AR payment postings and modernized payment-posting rendering for the shared billing anchor.

suites.name: Account Balance
suites.description: Compares charge, payment, adjustment, and balance rollups plus modernized account-balance rendering for the shared billing anchor.

suites.name: Account Aging
suites.description: Compares deterministic AR aging bucket totals and modernized aging-summary rendering for the shared billing anchor.

suites.name: Account Ledger
suites.description: Compares chronological charge, payment, adjustment, and running-balance ledger entries plus modernized account-ledger rendering for the shared billing anchor.

suites.name: Account Statement Readiness
suites.description: Compares statement-ready recipient, balance, current, past-due, period, due-date, and oldest-open details plus modernized statement-readiness rendering for the shared billing anchor.

suites.name: Account Statement Generation
suites.description: Compares deterministic printable patient statement number, instructions, generated text, and line items plus modernized statement rendering for the shared billing anchor.

suites.name: Account Statement PDF Export
suites.description: Compares deterministic patient statement PDF export readiness and modernized PDF download rendering for the shared billing anchor.

suites.name: Account Statement Batch
suites.description: Compares statement batch candidate rollups and the modernized Fees work queue against seeded account balances.

suites.name: Account Statement Batch Package
suites.description: Compares deterministic statement batch package manifest, summary CSV, PDFs, and modernized Fees export affordance against seeded account balances.

suites.name: Account Collections Work Queue
suites.description: Compares ranked past-due collections work queue rollups and modernized Fees rendering against seeded aging exposure.

suites.name: Account Collections Follow-Up
suites.description: Creates, renders, closes, soft-deletes, and removes a collections follow-up task through OpenEMR pnotes-compatible workflow behavior.

suites.name: Administration Directory
suites.description: Compares read-only users and facilities directory behavior against the legacy administration screens using shared gold-data anchors.

suites.name: Operational Reports
suites.description: Compares read-only operational reporting facts and report surfaces against legacy report screens using the shared gold dataset.

suites.name: Operational Reports Export
suites.description: Compares normalized operational report export rows and browser-visible CSV export affordances against the legacy report-export behavior.

suites.name: Patient Documents
suites.description: Compares read-only patient document metadata and document-list rendering against the legacy patient Documents screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Encounter Document Attachments
suites.description: Compares documents attached to a shared encounter anchor and validates the modernized encounter detail attachment surface.

suites.name: Encounter Document Revision Readiness
suites.description: Compares current revision and version-readiness facts for documents attached to a shared encounter anchor and validates modernized attachment-card rendering.

suites.name: Encounter Billing Linkage
suites.description: Compares active fee-sheet lines attached to a shared encounter anchor and validates the modernized encounter detail billing surface.

suites.name: Encounter Claim Linkage
suites.description: Compares claim status rows attached to a shared encounter anchor and validates the modernized encounter detail claim surface.

suites.name: Encounter Procedure Order Linkage
suites.description: Compares lab procedure orders attached to a shared encounter anchor and validates the modernized encounter detail procedure-order surface.

suites.name: Encounter Diagnosis Coding
suites.description: Compares encounter diagnosis, fee-sheet justification, and procedure-order diagnosis evidence attached to shared encounter anchors and validates the modernized diagnosis coding surface.

suites.name: Encounter Billing Linkage Mutation
suites.description: Creates a temporary fee-sheet line and verifies that the encounter-linked billing surfaces expose and then hide it as the row is deactivated and deleted.

suites.name: Encounter Diagnosis Coding Mutation
suites.description: Creates a temporary ICD10 fee-sheet diagnosis row and verifies that encounter diagnosis-coding surfaces expose and then hide it as the row is deactivated and deleted.

suites.name: Encounter Fee Sheet Entry
suites.description: Adds temporary CPT and ICD10 fee-sheet rows from the encounter workflow and verifies encounter billing and diagnosis surfaces expose and then hide them as the rows are deactivated and deleted.

suites.name: Encounter Procedure Order Entry
suites.description: Adds a temporary pending procedure order from the encounter workflow and verifies encounter procedure-order surfaces expose it before cleanup deletes it.

suites.name: Encounter Procedure Result Entry
suites.description: Adds a temporary procedure order, records a reviewed final result from the encounter workflow, and verifies encounter procedure report/result surfaces before cleanup deletes it.

suites.name: Encounter Sign-Off Mutation
suites.description: Creates, signs, renders, deletes, and removes an encounter attestation through the same encounter e-sign workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Co-Signature Mutation
suites.description: Creates two encounter signatures from distinct users, verifies ordering and rendering, deletes both signatures, and removes the temporary encounter on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Document Upload Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, renders, deletes, and removes a temporary text document through the encounter document workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Binary Document Upload Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, renders, downloads, deletes, and removes a temporary PDF document through the encounter document workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Scanned Attachment Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, renders, verifies scan readiness, deletes, and removes a temporary encounter-scoped scanned PDF document on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Document Sign-Off Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, approves, renders, deletes, and removes a temporary document through the encounter document workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Document Denial Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, denies, renders, deletes, and removes a temporary document through the encounter document workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Document Metadata Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, refiles, renders, deletes, and removes a temporary document through the encounter document workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Document Move Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, moves, renders, deletes, and removes a temporary document between same-patient encounters on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Document Content Replacement Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, replaces content, renders revision facts, deletes, and removes a temporary encounter-scoped document on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Binary Document Content Replacement Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, replaces binary PDF content, verifies preview and revision facts, downloads the replacement, and removes a temporary encounter-scoped document on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Document Replacement Revision Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, replaces content, verifies current revision hash/timestamp facts, renders the replacement, and removes a temporary encounter-scoped document on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Document Archive Restore Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, archives, hides, restores, renders, and removes a temporary encounter-scoped document on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Document Lifecycle Timeline Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, signs, archives, restores, renders lifecycle timeline state, deletes, and removes a temporary encounter-scoped document on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter External-Link Document Mutation
suites.description: Attaches, renders, archives, deletes, and removes a temporary encounter-scoped web URL document on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Content
suites.description: Compares full stored patient document payloads and validates modernized viewer/download retrieval for the shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Patient Document Preview Readiness
suites.description: Compares document preview kind, inline-readiness, thumbnail labels, and modernized document-card preview rendering for the shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Patient Document Revision Readiness
suites.description: Compares current document revision timestamp, version label, history count, and modernized revision rendering for the shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Patient Document Replacement Revision Mutation
suites.description: Verifies content replacement updates the current document revision timestamp and hash in place while preserving the single current-version contract.

suites.name: Patient Binary Document Content Replacement
suites.description: Creates a temporary PDF patient document, replaces its binary payload, verifies preview/revision/download facts, and removes it on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Insurance Coverage
suites.description: Compares primary and secondary insurance coverage facts and chart rendering against the legacy demographics screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Patient Immunizations
suites.description: Compares pediatric immunization history facts and rendering against the legacy Immunizations screen using a shared gold-data anchor.

suites.name: Administration Access Control
suites.description: Compares read-only ACL groups, permission objects, and default group-permission assignments against the legacy Access Control administration surface.

suites.name: Gold Database Contract
suites.description: Validates the seeded gold dataset through normalized database probes.

suites.name: HTTP Functional Contract
suites.description: Validates health, login form, and server-rendered app shell behavior.

suites.name: Playwright UI Contract
suites.description: Exercises browser-visible login, chart, encounter, scheduling, billing, lab result, reports, and administration workflows.

suites.name: Workflow Mutation Contract
suites.description: Exercises deterministic CRUD-style workflows with pre/post probes and cleanup.

suites.name: Patient Contact Mutation
suites.description: Updates, verifies, renders, and restores patient contact data through the same anchor-patient workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Demographics Mutation
suites.description: Updates, verifies, renders, and restores patient identity, address, marital-status, and occupation details through the same chart workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Registration Mutation
suites.description: Creates, verifies, renders, and removes a temporary registered patient through the same patient chart workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Mutation
suites.description: Creates, cancels, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Reschedule Mutation
suites.description: Creates, reschedules, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Arrival Mutation
suites.description: Creates, marks arrived, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Check-Out Mutation
suites.description: Creates, marks arrived, checks out, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment No-Show Mutation
suites.description: Creates, marks no-show, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Category Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, updates, and removes a categorized future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Pending Status Mutation
suites.description: Creates, marks pending, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Provider Reassignment Mutation
suites.description: Creates, reassigns provider, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Facility Reassignment Mutation
suites.description: Creates, reassigns facility, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Billing Location Reassignment Mutation
suites.description: Creates, reassigns billing location separately from service facility, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Comments Mutation
suites.description: Creates, updates comments, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Recurrence Metadata Mutation
suites.description: Creates, updates recurrence metadata, renders, and removes a future appointment through the same scheduling workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Appointment Recurring Series Read
suites.description: Expands seeded recurring appointment anchors into dated occurrences and verifies generated occurrence rendering on the modernized Calendar.

suites.name: Appointment Recurrence Exceptions Read
suites.description: Verifies seeded recurring appointment exception dates are skipped by both targets and rendered in the modernized Calendar.

suites.name: Appointment Occurrence Cancel Mutation
suites.description: Cancels one generated recurring appointment occurrence by appending an exception date, verifies recurrence expansion, and restores the seeded exception list.

suites.name: Appointment Occurrence Restore Mutation
suites.description: Restores one skipped generated recurring appointment occurrence by removing an exception date, verifies recurrence expansion, and keeps the seeded exception list stable.

suites.name: Appointment Occurrence Reschedule Mutation
suites.description: Reschedules one generated recurring appointment occurrence into a standalone appointment, skips the original date, verifies recurrence expansion, and restores the seeded exception list.

suites.name: Appointment Recurrence Exception Edit Mutation
suites.description: Edits the skipped-date list on a recurring appointment root, verifies generated occurrence expansion, and restores the seeded exception list.

suites.name: Appointment Series Root Update Mutation
suites.description: Edits a recurring appointment root, verifies generated occurrence title and time propagation, and restores the seeded root.

suites.name: Appointment Series Root Metadata Mutation
suites.description: Edits recurring appointment root provider, facility, category, status, room, and comments, verifies generated occurrence propagation, and restores the seeded root.

suites.name: Appointment Monthly Recurrence Mutation
suites.description: Creates a monthly recurring appointment, updates it to an every-two-month cadence, verifies generated occurrence expansion, and removes it.

suites.name: Appointment Recurrence Unit Matrix Mutation
suites.description: Creates daily, workday, and yearly recurring appointments, verifies generated occurrence expansion, and removes them.

suites.name: Appointment Days-of-Week Recurrence Mutation
suites.description: Creates a selected-weekday recurring appointment, verifies generated occurrence expansion, and removes it.

suites.name: Appointment Monthly Repeat-On Recurrence Mutation
suites.description: Creates nth-weekday and last-weekday monthly recurring appointments, verifies generated occurrence expansion, and removes them.

suites.name: Appointment Series Recurrence Update Mutation
suites.description: Updates a seeded recurring appointment root cadence and end date, verifies generated occurrence expansion changes, and restores it.

suites.name: Appointment Provider Overlap Mutation
suites.description: Creates overlapping same-provider appointments for two patients, verifies legacy-compatible double-booking tolerance and modernized overlap detail rendering, and removes them.

suites.name: Appointment Patient Overlap Mutation
suites.description: Creates overlapping same-patient appointments, verifies legacy-compatible double-booking tolerance and modernized patient overlap detail rendering, and removes them.

suites.name: Appointment Room Overlap Mutation
suites.description: Creates overlapping same-room appointments, verifies legacy-compatible double-booking tolerance and modernized room overlap detail rendering, and removes them.

suites.name: Appointment Reminders Readiness
suites.description: Derives reminder readiness from seeded future appointments and patient contact consent, then verifies modernized Calendar reminder rendering.

suites.name: Encounter Mutation
suites.description: Creates, updates, renders, and removes an encounter with vitals and SOAP details through the same clinical workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Encounter Metadata Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, updates, and removes encounter sensitivity, referral source, external ID, and POS metadata through the same clinical workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Clinical List Allergy Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes an allergy list entry through the same clinical-list workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Problem List Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes a medical problem through the same clinical-list workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Medication List Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes a medication list entry through the same clinical-list workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Message Mutation
suites.description: Creates, closes, renders, soft-deletes, and removes a patient message through the same pnotes workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Message Assignment
suites.description: Reassigns a patient message through the same pnotes assignment field on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Message Content
suites.description: Edits a patient message title and body through the same pnotes content fields on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, soft-deletes, and removes a database-backed patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Binary Patient Document Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, downloads, archives, and removes a PDF-style binary patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Image Document Preview
suites.description: Creates, renders, inline-previews, downloads, archives, and removes an image patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Image Document Thumbnail
suites.description: Creates, renders, thumbnails, archives, and removes an image patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient PDF Document Inline Preview
suites.description: Creates, renders, inline-previews, downloads, archives, and removes a PDF patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Lifecycle Timeline
suites.description: Creates, signs, renders lifecycle events, archives, restores, and removes a patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Scanned Attachment Readiness
suites.description: Creates, renders scan-readiness facts, archives, and removes a scanned PDF patient attachment through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Sign-Off Mutation
suites.description: Creates, approves, renders, archives, and removes a reviewed patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: External-Link Patient Document Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, archives, and removes a web-url patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Denial Mutation
suites.description: Creates, denies, renders, archives, and removes a reviewed patient document through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Metadata Mutation
suites.description: Creates, refiles, renders, archives, and removes a patient document through the same patient-file metadata workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Archive Restore Mutation
suites.description: Creates, archives, restores, renders, and removes a patient document through the same patient-file archive workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Document Content Replacement Mutation
suites.description: Creates, replaces, renders, archives, and removes a text patient document payload through the same patient-file workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Insurance Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, updates, and removes an insurance coverage row through the same patient chart workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Prescription Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes a prescription through the same medication workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Immunization Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, marks entered in error, and removes an immunization through the same immunization workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Billing Line Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, marks billed, deactivates, and removes a CPT billing line through the same fee-sheet workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Billing Diagnosis Line Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, deactivates, and removes an ICD10 diagnosis line through the same fee-sheet workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Billing Charge Correction Mutation
suites.description: Creates, corrects, renders, deactivates, and removes a CPT charge line through the same fee-sheet workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Billing Modifier Mutation
suites.description: Creates, applies modifier 25, renders, deactivates, and removes a CPT charge line through the same fee-sheet workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Payment Posting Mutation
suites.description: Creates, renders, voids, and removes a payment posting while verifying account balance and ledger effects on both targets.

suites.name: Claim Status Mutation
suites.description: Creates, generates, clears, renders, and removes a temporary claim status row through the same revenue-cycle workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Patient Payment Capture
suites.description: Captures, renders, voids, and removes a temporary patient-responsibility payment while verifying balance and ledger effects on both targets.

suites.name: Procedure Order Mutation
suites.description: Creates, completes, reports, renders, and removes a lab procedure order/result through the same procedure-results workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Procedure Result Correction
suites.description: Creates a temporary lab procedure result, corrects its value/status, verifies corrected rendering, and removes the temporary workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Procedure Specimen Metadata
suites.description: Creates a temporary lab report with collected date and specimen number, verifies report metadata rendering, and removes the temporary workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Administration Facility Mutation
suites.description: Creates, updates, renders, deactivates, and removes a facility through the same administration workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Administration User Mutation
suites.description: Creates, updates, renders, deactivates, and removes a user through the same administration workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Administration Access Permission Mutation
suites.description: Revokes, renders, restores, and verifies a focused ACL group-permission assignment through the same administration workflow on both targets.

suites.name: Administration User Group Membership Mutation
suites.description: Creates a user, assigns access group membership, renders it, revokes it, and removes the temporary user through the same administration workflow on both targets.
